chunks.text: Behind the scenes: Inauguration Weekend recap!
Biggest takeaways from DC during the Inauguration
TikTok's grace period extended, valuing the business, US new equity strategy?
Stargate: $500B AI investment, is Masa the GOAT?, bull case for OpenAI
How electricity production capacity plays into the global AI race
Netflix's stock rise correlates with some alarming societal trends

BREAKING: AI/Crypto Czar David Sacks joins to discuss the President's three new EOs Follow the besties: https://x.com/chamath https://x.com/Jason https://x.com/DavidSacks https://x.com/friedberg
